name: Dapansutrile HFrEF NLRP3 phase 1B trial
summary: A small randomized dose-escalation trial of oral NLRP3 inhibition in stable NYHA II-III systolic heart failure.
population: Stable NYHA II-III systolic heart failure patients

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer through the peer-reviewed publication; ClinicalTrials.gov had no posted registry results section in the June 14, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Cytokine and Inflammasome Modulation because they can show whether the intervention changes safety, function, and biomarkers in Stable NYHA II-III systolic heart failure patients. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
